channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Punjab and Haryana HC acquits Gurmeet Ram Rahim in 2002 journalist murder case
item.description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court on Saturday acquitted Dera Sacha Sauda chief Gurmeet Ram Rahim in connection with the 2002 murder of journalist Ram Chander Chhatrapati. This overturns the life sente...

item.title: Several Leaders Step Down from Bishop Muthee Kiengei’s JCM Church Amid Controversy
item.description: Bishop Muthee Kiengei has been facing intense public scrutiny after a number of key leaders left his Jesus Christ Compassion Ministries (JCM) church, especially following President William Ruto’s visi...

item.title: Donny Pangilinan and Kyle Echarri deliver intense action scenes in the ‘Roja’ finale
item.description: In the highly anticipated finale of the TV series “Roja,” actors Donny Pangilinan and Kyle Echarri showcased intense and action-packed scenes, leaving fans thrilled. The finale featured dramatic confr...

item.title: Outgoing JSE CEO Leila Fourie reflects on digital transformation and market growth
item.description: Outgoing JSE CEO Leila Fourie has stated she is leaving the Johannesburg Stock Exchange on a stronger footing, highlighting a robust balance sheet and a modernised digital infrastructure. Taking over ...

item.title: Cape Town Cycle Tour Highlights Emergency Preparedness and City Collaboration
item.description: The 48th Cape Town Cycle Tour, set for 8 March 2026, will cover a 109km loop around the Mother City and draw about 30,000 participants. Despite its festive atmosphere, the City of Cape Town treats the...

item.title: Simba SC secure 2-0 win over B19 to advance to CRDB Federation Cup round of 16
item.description: Simba SC managed a solid 2-0 win over B19 on Saturday, March 7, 2026, at Major Isamuhyo Stadium, booking their spot in the CRDB Federation Cup round of 16. The Msimbazi giants started strong, dominati...

item.title: Trump Criticises Starmer Over UK Military Support in Middle East Conflict
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has publicly criticised UK Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer for his approach to the ongoing conflict in Iran, asserting that the United States no longer requires Britis...

item.title: Siaya Governor James Orengo Demands Release of Staff Detained Ahead of Ruto Visit
item.description: Siaya Governor James Orengo has raised concerns over the arrest of several of his staff members, linking the detentions to the upcoming visit by President William Ruto on Sunday, 7 March 2026. Orengo,...

item.title: Women Mechanics Sustain and Modernise Long-Running Family Garage in Kottayam

item.title: Ruth Odinga Strengthens ODM and Prepares for 2027 Kisumu Governorship
item.description: After the passing of Raila Odinga, ODM faced uncertainty and potential internal power struggles, especially following the removal of Secretary General Edwin Sifuna. Ruth Odinga, Kisumu County Woman Re...

item.title: Hassan Msengi Climbs Mount Kilimanjaro During Ramadan to Inspire Youth
item.description: Hassan Hussein Msengi, popularly known as Babluck, became likely the first person to climb Mount Kilimanjaro while fasting during Ramadhan. Being a devout Muslim and an adventure enthusiast, he saw th...

item.title: Former IGP Egbetokun Orders Last-Minute Redeployments of Loyal Officers Ahead of Handover to Acting IGP Tunji Disu
item.description: Just two days after former Inspector-General of Police Kayode Egbetokun was removed from office and handed over to Acting IGP Tunji Disu on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, leaked police wireless message...

item.description: Senator Jinggoy Estrada defended his recent comments about American basketball player Elizabeth Means, clarifying that his questions regarding her romantic life were intended as light-hearted banter w...

item.title: Impact of Iran Conflict on Global Oil and Gas Supply Chains
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran is creating significant disruptions in the global energy market. Even if the war ends quickly, fuel prices around the world are expecte...

item.title: Live Updates and Results from UFC 326 Featuring Holloway vs Oliveira

item.title: Dr Hannah Gould on realistic approaches to death, eco-funerals, and end-of-life planning
item.description: Dr Hannah Gould, a death scholar and author of 'How to Die in the 21st Century', emphasises the importance of realistic expectations around death and eco-funerals. She predicts that by 2040, Australia...

item.title: Congressional Plaque Honouring Jan. 6 Police Finally Installed at Capitol
item.description: Over five years after the January 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol, a memorial plaque honouring the police officers who defended the building was quietly installed overnight. In the early hours of S...

item.title: Delhi Woman Escapes Assault by Hiding in Uttarakhand Forest Overnight
item.description: A 31-year-old woman from Delhi faced a terrifying ordeal during her solo trip to Uttarakhand. After arriving in Kathgodam on March 5, 2026, she hired a taxi to Nainital. At around 1:30 a.m., the drive...

item.title: Geopolitical Tensions Highlight Fragility of Global Oil Supply Chains
item.description: The recent escalation of conflict involving Iran, the US and Israel has put the Strait of Hormuz, a critical maritime corridor for oil transport, under severe strain. This strait connects Persian Gulf...

item.title: Convicted UK child killer Ian Huntley dies following prison assault
item.description: Ian Huntley, the British man convicted in 2003 for the murders of 10-year-old girls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman, has died at 52 after being attacked in Frankland prison in north-east England. Hunt...
